title: Altinity SQL Browser stored workspace v1
description: The atomic browser-persistence aggregate: one workspace with an ordered saved-query collection and zero or one Dashboard. Internal persistence contract; portable interchange uses portable-bundle-v1 instead.

storageVersion.title: Storage version
storageVersion.description: Stored-workspace contract version; always 1 for this contract. Unknown future versions fail closed.

id.title: Workspace identifier
id.description: Stable generated workspace identity. Two files with the same name still produce distinct workspace IDs.

name.title: Workspace name
name.description: User-visible workspace name. Renaming the workspace does not rename its Dashboard.

queries.title: Saved queries
queries.description: The ordered saved-query collection in catalog/authoring order, independent of Dashboard tile order. Required even when empty.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: The zero-or-one editable Dashboard of this workspace; null when none exists.
